Title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows | TechCrunch
Description: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.

Title: Learn about Lore: next-generation open source version control
Description: Maintained by Epic Games, Lore is designed for unprecedented scalability of both data and teams. It’s optimized for projects that combine code with large binary assets.

Title: Future of the Web 2026: AI Brand Visibility Research | WordPress VIP
Description: Original research from 2,000 decision-makers and consumers on AI brand visibility, content trust, and what brands need to do as the web feels less human. 74% say the internet feels less human than it did 10 years ago.
